\tzpentry{ID3899}{Kaluza-Klein Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3899 introduces Kaluza-Klein Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} |m_{KK}|_{\text{min}} = \frac{R_{KK}}{c} \times \sqrt{\frac{4k_BT \cdot \text{BW}}{Q \cdot E_{\text{stored}}}} \approx 10^{-5} \end{equation}
